image_source.selection_reason: 技能要求必须使用 openEuler 24.03 LTS 镜像进行验证

architecture.value: x86_64 and aarch64 are documented; actual verification used x86_64 WSL host

recommended_image.value: Documentation recommends building the project Docker image from ci/docker/{arch} or docker/builder/{arch}; validation used required openEuler 24.03 LTS base image instead.

value: CANN Toolkit/ops/NNAL and NPU driver/firmware for runtime verification

build_commands.source: README.md lines 82-89; docs/zh/installation_guide/compilation_installation_using_source_code.md lines 44-51; concurrency limited to 60% of 20 cores

sample_commands.value: python3 -c "import torch;import torch_npu; a = torch.randn(3, 4).npu(); print(a + a);" and quick verification matrix multiply sample

value.name: CANN Toolkit/ops/NNAL and NPU driver/firmware
value.install_method: Documentation points to CANN installation documentation and set_env.sh; not installed in this validation container because only source/build validation was possible without Ascend runtime packages and hardware.

value.name: PyTorch CPU wheel index
value.install_method: pip extra-index-url for torch==2.7.1+cpu on x86_64

special_dependencies.source: README.md lines 13-29; README.md lines 150-162; docs/zh/installation_guide/preparing_installation.md lines 11-18; requirements.txt lines 1-10

execution_log.output_summary: Docker available; host x86_64, 20 cores, 15Gi memory.

execution_log.command: git fetch --depth=1 origin v2.7.1 && git checkout v2.7.1
execution_log.output_summary: Repository switched to v2.7.1 at a81f4a55b244ab8e1e36b1726cf7201a83f7a709.
Failed with fatal: Unable to find current revision in submodule path 'third_party/acl_src/runtime'.
Failed due to openEuler source repository metadata timeout.
System build dependencies installed successfully after increasing DNF timeout/retry settings.

execution_log.command: python3 -m pip install pyyaml setuptools auditwheel wheel numpy==1.23.2 torch==2.7.1+cpu triton-ascend==3.2.1
execution_log.output_summary: First attempt timed out downloading triton-ascend; retry exposed numpy conflict: triton-ascend 3.2.1 requires numpy==1.26.4.
Installed torch-2.7.1+cpu, triton-ascend-3.2.1, numpy-1.26.4 and other dependencies successfully.

execution_log.command: git fetch runtime refs/keep-around/6cce8b...; git checkout 6cce8b...
execution_log.output_summary: Recovered runtime submodule from refs/keep-around after removing stale shallow.lock.
Initial build failed because wheel was missing; after installing wheel, build failed because op-plugin was not at expected commit and later because fmt was not at expected commit.

execution_log.command: git submodule update --init --force --depth=1 for mismatched submodules
execution_log.output_summary: Fixed dvm, fmt, googletest, nlohmann, op-plugin and torchair submodules to expected commits.
Wheel built successfully: dist/torch_npu-2.7.1.post5+gita81f4a5-cp311-cp311-linux_x86_64.whl. Build duration estimated from artifact timestamps: about 24 minutes.
Built wheel installed successfully after adding the PyTorch CPU wheel index.
Import failed: libhccl.so not found. With generated stub libraries in LD_LIBRARY_PATH, import failed: libtensorpipe.so undefined symbol aclGetRecentErrMsg.
UT command failed immediately on import torch_npu due to libtensorpipe.so undefined symbol aclGetRecentErrMsg.

process_timeline.action: Started repository validation for Ascend/pytorch v2.7.1
Pulled and started openEuler 24.03 LTS container
Installed system dependencies after DNF timeout tuning

build.duration_note: The script duration echo was invalid because shell expansion occurred outside the container; duration estimated from build artifact timestamps 05:33-05:57 inside container.

failures.name: UT bootstrap import torch_npu
failures.reason: ImportError: /usr/local/lib64/python3.11/site-packages/torch_npu/lib/libtensorpipe.so: undefined symbol: aclGetRecentErrMsg. Without LD_LIBRARY_PATH to stubs, import also failed because libhccl.so was missing.

results.output_summary: ImportError: libhccl.so not found; with generated stub libraries, undefined symbol aclGetRecentErrMsg.

results.command: python3 -c "import torch; import torch_npu; a = torch.randn(3, 4).npu(); print(a + a);"
results.output_summary: Same import failure before NPU operation execution. No Ascend device/CANN runtime was available in the validation container.

documentation_gaps: README.md source build instructions refer to branch 2.7.1-7.2.0, while the requested branch was v2.7.1; docs/zh source guide uses v2.7.1-26.0.0 as example, creating ambiguity for exact v2.7.1 branch validation.

Documentation states gcc 11.2.0 is required for PyTorch 2.7.1 x86_64, but openEuler 24.03 repositories installed gcc 12.3.1; no openEuler 24.03 command for installing gcc 11.2.0 was available in the build instructions used.
requirements.txt does not list wheel, but setup.py imports wheel.bdist_wheel; build failed until wheel was installed.

CANN runtime installation is referenced via external documentation and links, but no direct offline package URL or container-ready installation command was present in the repository docs for this validation environment.
Full UT and installation verification require a complete CANN runtime and NPU hardware; the docs do not provide a CPU-only/stub-only validation path for torch_npu import/tests.

problems_encountered.problem: Docker resources needed to be reset before verification.
problems_encountered.resolution: With user confirmation, all Docker containers and images were removed; openEuler 24.03 LTS image was pulled fresh.

problems_encountered.problem: Initial clone/submodule work was interrupted and tmp_src contained only partial repository state.
problems_encountered.resolution: Fetched v2.7.1 with depth=1 and checked out branch explicitly.
problems_encountered.source: git ls-remote and git fetch output

problems_encountered.problem: DNF source and EPOL repository downloads timed out repeatedly.
problems_encountered.resolution: Retried with source/debuginfo disabled where possible and used longer DNF timeout/retries/minrate settings. Installation eventually succeeded.

problems_encountered.problem: triton-ascend wheel download timed out on first pip attempt.
problems_encountered.resolution: Retried with longer pip timeout and documented indexes; download succeeded.

problems_encountered.problem: Manual numpy==1.23.2 conflicted with triton-ascend==3.2.1 requiring numpy==1.26.4.
problems_encountered.resolution: Installed strictly from requirements.txt without manual numpy pin; pip resolved numpy==1.26.4.

problems_encountered.problem: third_party/acl_src/runtime submodule could not find current revision after interrupted shallow clone.
problems_encountered.resolution: Found the commit under refs/keep-around/6cce8b... on the remote, removed stale shallow.lock after checking no git process was running, and checked out the commit manually.
problems_encountered.source: git ls-remote and git fetch output

problems_encountered.problem: Several submodules were checked out at remote default branch heads rather than main repository expected commits.
problems_encountered.resolution: Forced submodule updates for dvm, fmt, googletest, nlohmann, op-plugin, and torchair; build progressed after fixes.
problems_encountered.source: git submodule status and build errors

problems_encountered.problem: Build initially failed with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'wheel'.
problems_encountered.resolution: Installed wheel because setup.py imports wheel.bdist_wheel; build proceeded.

problems_encountered.problem: Wheel install initially could not resolve torch==2.7.1+cpu because pip only used the configured Tsinghua index.
problems_encountered.resolution: Retried with README/requirements PyTorch CPU extra index https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu; install succeeded.

problems_encountered.problem: UT and samples failed after wheel installation due to missing complete CANN runtime libraries/symbols.
problems_encountered.resolution: Tried generated ACL stub libraries via LD_LIBRARY_PATH, but import still failed with undefined symbol aclGetRecentErrMsg. Recorded as runtime dependency gap; no source modification was performed.
